title: makers of ChatGPT, confidentially file for initial public offering
description: OpenAI, the creator of ChatGPT, confidentially filed for an initial public offering IPO on Tuesday. The move positions the artificial intelligence firm for a highly anticipated stock market debut. It also sets up a substantial payout for the company's early financial backers.

title: India is France’s official partner for VivaTech next week, positioning itself as global leader in AI, digital innovation
description: VivaTech 2026 in Paris is set to feature India as its Official Partner Country, reflecting the nation's rising influence in the realms of artificial intelligence and digital innovation. Attendees can look forward to insightful presentations on India's technological advancements and public digital infrastructure.

title: Apple expected to unveil new AI features at last developers conference with Tim Cook

title: Perplexity CEO Keeps 2028 IPO Target Intact Ahead Of OpenAI, Anthropic Listings
description: Perplexity CEO Srinivas said the company's IPO plans remain unchanged even as some of the biggest names in artificial intelligence prepare to test public market appetite.
